_comment: Embrace the interactive master script. An intimate interactive interface for adult maids, including: main menu, hugs, kisses, head touches, chat branches, and dialogues that change according to weather/time/favorability stage.

_comment_structure._comment: Script partition: idle is the main menu; kiss/hug/pet_intro is the opening dialogue of the action; chat_topic_router is responsible for dividing the chat into different topics; chat_stage_* is the exclusive dialogue divided according to the liking stage.

entry_router._comment: Interactive entry routing. When the mother has a child in the infant stage and is still named "Little Maid" by default, priority will be given to entering the naming plot; if the conditions are not met, the main menu will be entered normally.

idle._comment: Main interactive entrance. After entering the interface, it will be displayed here first. The first sentence is the opening statement based on the current mood, and then the main options are given such as communicating/kissing/hugging/letting go of her first/touching the head.

choices.title: Talk
choices.description: Chat with her, and gently cheer her up.

choices.title: Tell Her Your Feelings
choices.description: Say the words you have been holding back.

choices.title: Exchange Vows
choices.description: Place the ring on her finger yourself, and vow to share your life with her.

choices.title: Actions
choices.description: Kiss, hug, lap pillow, head pats, and other close actions.

choices.title: Put the Child Down
choices.description: Ask Mom to let the child rest on the ground.

choices.title: Look at the Child in Her Arms
choices.description: She is holding the newborn little maid, as if she has something important to tell you.

action_menu._comment: Secondary action menu. Generic close actions are kept here so the main interaction screen stays compact.

prompt.text: What would you like to do with her?

choices.title: Kiss
choices.description: Kiss her softly, letting your feelings pass between your lips.

choices.title: Hug
choices.description: Hold her close, and feel the warmth between you.

choices.title: Lap Pillow
choices.description: Rest your head on her lap, and let her stay quietly by your side.

choices.title: Rest on Her Lap
choices.description: She is not feeling well today. Maybe comfort her first.

choices.title: Ask for Comfort
choices.description: Gently ask her to stroke your head.

choices.title: Sit Up
choices.description: Slowly sit up from her lap.

choices.title: Let Her Go
choices.description: Slowly loosen your arms and let her leave the hug naturally.

choices.title: Pat Her Head
choices.description: Gently pat her head.

choices.title: Back
choices.description: Return to the main interaction options.

child_name_intro._comment: Triggered when the mother holds the yet-to-be-officially-named child after the birth of the little maid. The actual name change still requires server-side verification, and the script is only responsible for taking over the plot and opening the naming UI.

lines.text: As you step closer, ${maid} instinctively holds the little maid in her arms a little more securely. The child sleeps lightly, tiny fingers curled as if holding on to the last bit of warmth from her mother?s clothes.

lines.speaker: ${maid}
lines.text: ${player_maid}... you came. She slept for a little while just now. She is being very good.

lines.speaker: ${maid}
lines.text: I keep thinking that someday people will call this child by her name. She will turn around when she hears it, and she will know that we waited for her with all our hearts.

lines.speaker: ${maid}
lines.text: So... shall we give her a real name together?

child_name_choice._comment: Post-plot naming confirmation. As a manual entry in the main menu, players are allowed to name it later; whether naming is actually allowed is still verified by the server.

prompt.speaker: ${maid}
prompt.text: Do you want to name her now?

choices.title: Name the Child
choices.description: Give the newborn child a name. This can only be done once.

choices.title: Maybe Later
choices.description: Leave it for now, and decide with her when you are ready.

communication_menu._comment: The main entrance to communication. Expand the direct "chat" into a small diversion: chat normally, please her, or tease her to crank the crank.

choices.title: Chat
choices.description: Talk slowly about today, the weather, and whatever she wants to say.

choices.title: Pamper Her
choices.description: Coax her a little, or prepare a small gift.

choices.title: Tell a Joke
choices.description: Try a silly joke and see whether she feels like playing along today.

choices.title: Go Turn the Crank
choices.description: Half serious, half teasing. See how she answers you.

choices.title: Not Now
choices.description: Return to the current interaction options.

flatter_menu._comment: Please branch. Here we will only do text and mood/favor feedback, and the real gift consumption system will come later.

choices.title: Praise Her Hard
choices.description: Praise her so much she has nowhere to hide.

choices.title: Give a Gift
choices.description: Open the gift screen and choose something for her.

choices.title: Another Topic
choices.description: Return to talking.

lines.text: ${flatter_praise_text}
${flatter_gift_text}
${communication_crank_hard_text}
${communication_crank_soft_text}

chat_menu._comment: Chat secondary menu. Here we are only responsible for choosing the direction of the chat, and no additional bridging lines are played.

choices.title: Casual Chat
choices.description: Pick a topic and talk about ordinary little things.

choices.title: Weather
choices.description: See what she wants to say about today’s weather.

choices.title: Not This
choices.description: Return to talking.

chat_general_menu._comment: Secondary menu for casual chat. Use the set of daily topics in the docs and decide on answers by liking stage.

choices.title: Daily Life
choices.description: Talk about plain, ordinary days.

choices.title: Her Thoughts
choices.description: Let her slowly say what she has been keeping inside.

choices.title: Rest
choices.description: Ask whether she is tired.

choices.title: Time of Day
choices.description: See what this hour makes her want to say.

choices.title: Dependence
choices.description: Talk about how naturally you have grown used to each other.

choices.title: The Future
choices.description: Think a little further ahead together.

choices.title: Another Direction
choices.description: Return to the chat menu.

chat_weather_router._comment: Dedicated stream for weather chat. After clicking in, the current weather will be automatically determined, and players will no longer be allowed to manually select whether it will be sunny, rainy, thunderous, or snowy.

chat_weather_special._comment: Special dimension/meme weather topics. It is used in areas such as hell, the end, and the realm of deep darkness that do not naturally fall into the context of ordinary weather, rain, snow, and thunder.

lines.text: ${chat_topic_weather_special_text}
${chat_text}
${chat_topic_life_text}
${chat_topic_heart_text}
${chat_topic_rest_text}
${chat_topic_time_text}
${chat_topic_depend_text}
${chat_topic_future_text}
${low_comfort_text}
${release_hug_text}

release_carried_child_router._comment: UI feedback routing after dropping the maid. The server will refuse to put the baby down on the first day. Here, the refusal lines are displayed simultaneously to avoid false success reports.

lines.speaker: ${maid}
lines.text: ${player_maid}, she still cannot walk yet. Let me hold her for today. When she grows a little bigger, we can slowly teach her to stand.
She lowers her head and adjusts the little maid in her arms. The child seems to recognize the familiar heartbeat and settles safely against her mother again.

Mm... I will put her down for a moment.
She checks the little maid in her arms and moves gently, as if afraid to disturb that soft little weight.

lines.speaker: ${player}
lines.text: What shocks a creeper the most?

lines.speaker: ${maid}
lines.text: A cat?

lines.speaker: ${player}
lines.text: No. A man. Creeper? Aww man.

lines.speaker: ${maid}
lines.text: So we back in the mine?

lines.speaker: ${player}
lines.text: Got our pickaxe swinging from side to side-

lines.speaker: ${maid}
lines.text: ...Wow. That joke is ancient.

lines.speaker: ${maid}
lines.text: You actually went along with that one. It is so old that {maid} almost wants to laugh at you.
She tries to keep a straight face, but the punchline breaks through and her shoulders start shaking.

lines.speaker: ${maid}
lines.text: ...So all that setup was just to drag {maid} into this silly joke?
She sounds serious about complaining, yet her eyes have already drifted away as she holds back a smile.

lines.speaker: ${maid}
lines.text: Even now, you are throwing ancient jokes at {maid}...
She presses her temple lightly. Still, the heavy mood is stirred loose just a little.

lines.speaker: ${player}
lines.text: Why can’t creepers make friends?

lines.speaker: ${maid}
lines.text: Why?

lines.speaker: ${player}
lines.text: Because the moment they open up, the mood explodes.

lap_pillow_start._comment: Knee pillow to start. The actual position locking and condition verification are handled by the server-side LapPillowManager, which is only responsible for plot feedback.

lines.text: ${lap_pillow_start_text}

lap_pillow_refuse._comment: Knee pillow mood rejection. When her mood is lower than normal, she will not enter the action, and the player will only be prompted to accompany her to restore her mood.

lines.text: ${lap_pillow_refuse_text}

lap_pillow_pet._comment: Let the maid touch the player's head in the lap pillow. The server sends petTicks for synchronization, and the client action bridge superimposes hand movements accordingly.

lines.text: ${lap_pillow_pet_text}

lap_pillow_exit._comment: Knee pillow ends feedback. The action package first requests the server to unlock the position, and then returns to the normal interactive menu.

lines.text: ${lap_pillow_exit_text}

pet_intro._comment: Touch the head entrance. Here are divided according to the current stage of affection. The reactions at different stages are different: the first stage is puzzlement, the second stage is shy, the third stage is like it, and the fourth stage is used to it and actively acts coquettishly.

lines.text: ${pet_intro_text}
${pet_intro_text}
${pet_intro_text}
${pet_intro_text}

chat_topic_router._comment: Main entrance to chat. The text is not displayed directly here, but it is decided which type of topic this chat should fall into: depression and comfort, weather topics, morning and evening greetings, stage-specific dialogue, or ordinary daily chat.

chat_low_mood._comment: Chat when you are down. This is a comforting conversation suitable for the maid when her mood is low today. It does not emphasize stage advancement, but focuses on companionship and comfort.

prompt.speaker: ${maid}
prompt.text: I'm a little down on energy today... ${player_maid}, can you stay quiet with me for a while?

choices.title: Stay Quietly Beside Her
choices.description: Do not press her. Just stay nearby until she calms down.

choices.title: Comfort Her Softly
choices.description: Tell her she does not have to force herself today.

choices.title: Try to Cheer Her Up
choices.description: Tell a joke, though she may not be ready for it while down.

lines.speaker: ${maid}
lines.text: low quiet.
She listens quietly, and the tension in her shoulders eases little by little.

lines.speaker: ${maid}
lines.text: Some conversations do not need to be dramatic. Being heard is already enough.

lines.speaker: ${maid}
lines.text: low comfort.

lines.speaker: ${maid}
lines.text: She listens quietly, and the tension in her shoulders eases little by little.

lines.speaker: ${maid}
lines.text: Some conversations do not need to be dramatic. Being heard is already enough.

lines.speaker: ${maid}
lines.text: low joke.
She listens quietly, and the tension in her shoulders eases little by little.

lines.speaker: ${maid}
lines.text: Some conversations do not need to be dramatic. Being heard is already enough.

_comment_weather_group._comment: The following is a shared chat topic: weather and time of day. These topics may be entered into at all stages, but the same answer will have different tones depending on the current favorability stage.

chat_thunder._comment: Chatting during thunderstorms. The themes are fear, companionship and security. All stages can be triggered.

prompt.speaker: ${maid}
prompt.text: The thunder outside is so loud... ${player_maid}, do you think it's a bit noisy too?

choices.title: I’ll Stay with You
choices.description: Let her know you will not leave before the storm passes.

choices.title: Listen to the Rain Together
choices.description: Turn the frightening storm into background sound for two.

choices.title: Even Thunder Fears You
choices.description: Use something light to ease the mood.

lines.speaker: ${maid}
lines.text: thunder stay.
She listens quietly, and the tension in her shoulders eases little by little.

lines.text: Some conversations do not need to be dramatic. Being heard is already enough.

chat_rain._comment: Chat on a rainy day. The themes are tenderness, care and memories of rainy days. All stages can be triggered.

prompt.speaker: ${maid}
prompt.text: When it rains, the eaves and windows become very quiet.

choices.title: Offer a Hot Drink
choices.description: Rainy days should warm both hands and hearts.

choices.title: Rainy Memories
choices.description: Ask whether she has a rainy day she likes.

choices.title: Don’t Get Soaked
choices.description: Seriously remind her not to overdo it outside.

chat_clear._comment: Chat on a sunny day. The theme is more relaxed, about going out, sunbathing, and ordinary daily life when the weather is nice.

prompt.speaker: ${maid}
prompt.text: The weather is very good today. Just looking outside like this makes my mood brighter.

choices.title: Soak Up the Sun
choices.description: Stay with her for a while in the bright air.

choices.title: Talk About the Sky
choices.description: Follow the weather into something light and slow.

choices.title: Ask About Going Out
choices.description: On a day like this, even a walk together feels easier.

chat_snow._comment: Chatting on a snowy day. The themes tend to be quiet, close, cold air and the feeling of wanting to be together.

choices.description: Look outside together and let the day slow down.

choices.title: Stay In Together
choices.description: Snow makes home feel even warmer with someone beside you.

chat_morning._comment: Chat in the morning. The theme is to say good morning seriously, ask about today's plans, and remind not to be too tired. All stages can be triggered.

prompt.speaker: ${maid}
prompt.text: Good morning, ${player_maid}. Do you want to start slowly together today?

choices.title: Say Good Morning
choices.description: Begin the day in the simplest, steadiest way.

choices.title: Ask Today’s Plans
choices.description: Let her talk about what she wants to do today.

choices.title: Don’t Overwork
choices.description: If today will be busy, you still want her to care for herself.

chat_night._comment: Chatting at night. The theme is good night, companionship and a more shy nighttime atmosphere. All stages can be triggered.

choices.title: Tell Her to Rest
choices.description: Night is the time to hand tiredness over to sleep.

choices.title: Stay a Little Longer
choices.description: If she cannot sleep yet, stay with her a while.

choices.title: Say You’ll Miss Her
choices.description: Make good night a little more honest.

_comment_stage_group._comment: Below are the exclusive chats broken down by favorability stage. Only after reaching the corresponding favorability level, the chat will enter these stages with specialized dialogue.

chat_stage_warm._comment: Exclusive chat in the first stage, favorability level 32~63. At this stage, we can touch each other, and the relationship is beginning to heat up, but overall it is still slow, tentative, and getting closer.

prompt.speaker: ${maid}
prompt.text: When I talk to you recently, I don’t seem as nervous as before.

choices.title: Praise Her Effort
choices.description: Notice the little progress she makes every day.

choices.title: Give Her Space
choices.description: When you have just grown closer, respect her pace.

choices.title: Know Her Better
choices.description: Honestly say you want to come closer.

lines.speaker: ${maid}
lines.text: stage warm pet.

lines.speaker: ${maid}
lines.text: She listens quietly, and the tension in her shoulders eases little by little.

chat_stage_warm_direct_result._comment: The first stage 32~63: Want to know her better. She will listen very carefully, but will also be a little defensive and shy.

chat_stage_close._comment: In the second stage, exclusive chat, the favorability level is 64~127. At this stage, I can already hug, the relationship is obviously closer, and the lines will be more dependent and want to be closer.

prompt.speaker: ${maid}
prompt.text: After hugging, I discovered that people's heartbeats really can be transmitted to each other.

choices.title: She Can Rely on You

choices.title: Ask If She’s Shy

choices.title: Promise Another Hug

chat_stage_dating._comment: In the third stage, exclusive chat, the favorability level is 128~197. At this stage, you have entered the dating stage, you can already kiss, and your lines will be more direct, shy, and more like a conversation between lovers.

choices.title: Invite Her for a Walk

chat_stage_marriage._comment: The fourth stage is exclusive chat, with a favorability score of 198 and above. This stage favors a post-marital/long-term relationship tone, with an emphasis on living together, commitment, and stable intimacy.

chat_daily._comment: Ordinary daily chatting. When there is no special weather, special time period or stage-specific topic hit before, this is the place to go.

prompt.speaker: ${maid}
prompt.text: What do you want to talk about today? If it's just a small talk, I'd love to hear what you have to say.

choices.title: Tell Her She’s Cute
choices.description: Direct, simple, and very effective.

choices.title: Ask If She’s Tired
choices.description: Care whether she has rested enough today.

choices.title: Space Out Together
choices.description: Do nothing, and share a small piece of time.

choices.title: Tease Her Gently
choices.description: When the mood is good, let her blush a little.

lines.text: daily praise.
She listens quietly, and the tension in her shoulders eases little by little.

She listens quietly, and the tension in her shoulders eases little by little.

lines.speaker: ${maid}
lines.text: Some conversations do not need to be dramatic. Being heard is already enough.

confession_intro._comment: Tell her your feelings independently at the plot entrance.

lines.text: For some reason, your maid grows shy in front of you. Her cheeks are faintly red, and it seems there is something she has been trying to say.

lines.speaker: ${maid}
lines.text: Um... Master...

lines.speaker: ${maid}
lines.text: I... I have something to tell you! Something really important!
After saying that, she lowers her head. Her fox ears tremble uneasily, and both hands clutch the edge of her skirt...

choices.title: I’m Listening. Take Your Time.
choices.description: Quietly wait for her to finish saying what is in her heart.

choices.title: Is It... What I’m Thinking Too?
choices.description: Break the softness between you one step early.

lines.speaker: ${maid}
lines.text: I-it is that important...?
She presses her lips together. Her breathing is light with nerves, but she still straightens herself, afraid to miss even one word.

lines.speaker: ${maid}
lines.text: Then... I will listen properly. Master, please say it.

lines.speaker: ${maid}
lines.text: Eh? Why do I have to agree first...?
She looks up at you in panic, then reddens and quickly looks away.

lines.speaker: ${maid}
lines.text: ...Fine. {maid} will not run. Master, you are not allowed to bully {maid} on purpose.
She takes a deep breath and lowers her hands from her face. Her eyes are red, but she keeps them fixed on you.

lines.speaker: ${maid}
lines.text: Master, you have to let me say it properly! S-something like this should be said by me first!

lines.speaker: ${maid}
lines.text: Master, I love you.

lines.speaker: ${maid}
lines.text: Not... not the kind of love a maid has for her master...

lines.speaker: ${maid}
lines.text: I mean the kind of love that wants to stay with Master forever... the kind that wants to be your lover!
The moment she finishes, all the strength seems to leave her. Her ears droop, and her face turns so red it looks ready to steam.

lines.speaker: ${maid}
lines.text: Uu... I finally said it... this is so embarrassing...

lines.speaker: ${maid}
lines.text: Master, do you know? I have wanted to tell you for so long. I just never found the right moment...

lines.speaker: ${maid}
lines.text: {maid} has always, always loved Master. And every day, {maid} loves you even more!

lines.speaker: ${maid}
lines.text: From the day I was summoned from the soul spell, from the day we made our contract, from the first time I finally saw Master and you gave me that little cake... I already loved you!
She speaks faster and faster, as if stopping for even a second would make her lose the courage to continue.

lines.speaker: ${maid}
lines.text: Master has always been so kind to {maid}... even if you are often away...

lines.speaker: ${maid}
lines.text: Whenever there is something good to eat, Master gives it to me and gnaws on rotten flesh instead.

lines.speaker: ${maid}
lines.text: Whenever there is good equipment, Master always lets me wear it first.

lines.speaker: ${maid}
lines.text: When I get hurt, Master panics even more than I do, searching the whole backpack for food and potions to feed me...
She keeps talking, one thing after another, as if trying to pour out every memory since the day you met.

lines.speaker: ${maid}
lines.text: When Master is not home, I miss you all the time.

lines.speaker: ${maid}
lines.text: I miss watching Master eat the food I made with that happy face, and hearing you say {maid} would make a good wife. I miss the days when we talk together, play games together...

lines.speaker: ${maid}
lines.text: {maid} thinks about so many things. No matter how much I think, it never feels enough!
At this point, her voice suddenly slows.

lines.speaker: ${maid}
lines.text: Master might not know this... but a maid can choose to bind herself to someone...

lines.speaker: ${maid}
lines.text: Not a work contract... something closer to the soul...

lines.speaker: ${maid}
lines.text: Once I am bound... wherever Master goes, I can follow. When Master mines, I can place torches. When Master builds a house, I can carry materials. When Master is in danger, I can appear right away... even if Master asks me to crank out 2147483648su of stress, I will keep turning with everything I have.

lines.speaker: ${maid}
lines.text: When Master is away at night... I will not have to wait at home all alone anymore... because I will be with Master...
As she speaks, her voice grows softer and begins to tremble with tears...

lines.speaker: ${maid}
lines.text: Master, do you know? On the days when you were gone... I would stand at the highest place in the house... staring in the direction you left, and keep watching, and watching...

lines.speaker: ${maid}
lines.text: I kept looking to see whether Master’s name would appear in the distance...

lines.speaker: ${maid}
lines.text: One time I waited three days and three nights... I ate all the food in my backpack... and you still did not come back...

lines.speaker: ${maid}
lines.text: That was when I thought... if only I were Master’s lover...

lines.speaker: ${maid}
lines.text: Then I could say it openly-
She lifts her head. Her eyes are red, tears circling inside them, but she desperately holds them back.

lines.speaker: ${maid}
lines.text: Take me with you... please do not go so far away by yourself...

lines.speaker: ${maid}
lines.text: Master... will you accept {maid}'s feelings...?

choices.title: I Love You Too.
choices.description: Accept her feelings sincerely, and answer with tenderness.

choices.title: ...Let Me Breathe.
choices.description: You are not ready to take that step yet.

lines.text: Your maid freezes for one second, and then tears fall one after another.

lines.speaker: ${maid}
lines.text: Uu... r-really...?

lines.speaker: ${maid}
lines.text: It is not... not just because I helped feed the pigs and cows and ducks, harvested wheat for you, and fought zombies for you... right...?

lines.speaker: ${player}
lines.text: ${maid}, look at me.
The maid lifts her head through soft sobs. Her eyes are red, and tears still cling to her lashes.

lines.speaker: ${player}
lines.text: I swear that every word I say is true.

lines.speaker: ${player}
lines.text: I love you. Not because you are useful, but because you are my ${maid}, the person I treasure most.

lines.speaker: ${player}
lines.text: I want to wake up and see you every day. I want to eat the food you make, mine with you, adventure with you, and watch the sunrise and sunset in every biome with you.

lines.speaker: ${player}
lines.text: Your care, and every day you waited for me to come home... I remember all of it, and I cherish it.

lines.speaker: ${player}
lines.text: So I want to say this: ${maid}, will you stay by my side from now on? Not as my maid, but as the most important person in my life.
Her tears fall even harder. Her fair hands flush from emotion as she lightly pounds your chest.

lines.speaker: ${maid}
lines.text: Uu... Master, you big dummy...

lines.speaker: ${maid}
lines.text: If you say things like that... if you say them out loud... I will cling to you for the rest of my life...

lines.speaker: ${player}
lines.text: Then let it be for the rest of our lives. In every lifetime, we will never part.
The maid throws herself into your arms, burying her face against your chest as she cries in little hiccups.

lines.speaker: ${maid}
lines.text: Uu... then I will not hold back...

lines.speaker: ${maid}
lines.text: From now on... Master belongs to me too... no taking it back...

lines.speaker: ${player}
lines.text: Mm. I swear on Nochi, I will never take it back.
After a long while, she finally lifts her head from your arms. Her eyes are still wet, but a soft sweetness already hides at the edge of her smile.

lines.speaker: ${player}
lines.text: If you want this too, I do not want today to stop at a confession. May I put the wedding dress I prepared on you?

lines.speaker: ${maid}
lines.text: Eh... r-right now?
You gently drape the wedding dress over her shoulders and straighten the veil. As the white fabric falls, she seems wrapped in soft light, even her gaze warming as she looks at you.

lines.speaker: ${maid}
lines.text: M-Master... if you do this, {maid} really might get too nervous to stand...
She peeks at you through her fingers. Her ears are red to the roots, but she does not take even one step back.

lines.speaker: ${maid}
lines.text: But... if Master is the groom, {maid} wants to wear it. {maid} wants Master to see it with his own eyes.

choices.title: Straighten Her Veil and Take Her Hand
choices.description: Leave your vows to this wedding.

lines.text: You straighten her veil until it sits perfectly, then take her hand. It is trembling, yet she holds yours back with such earnest care.

lines.speaker: ${player}
lines.text: From today on, you are not only my lover. You are the person I want to walk beside for all the days ahead.

lines.speaker: ${player}
lines.text: Whether the days are peaceful or the adventures are a mess, I will be with you.

lines.speaker: ${player}
lines.text: I will cherish you, care for you, and every time I come home, I will come home to you with all my heart.

lines.speaker: ${maid}
lines.text: ...{maid} wants to say it too.

lines.speaker: ${maid}
lines.text: {maid} wants to love you a little more every day, and then a little more than the day before.

lines.speaker: ${maid}
lines.text: I want to laugh with you when you are happy, hold you when you are tired, and be the first one to see through you when you pretend you are fine.

lines.speaker: ${maid}
lines.text: And I want to keep the gentlest, clingiest parts of {maid} for you alone.
After the last words, her eyes redden again, but she still does not look away. She only gazes straight at you, as if quietly placing the rest of her life into your hands.

lines.speaker: ${maid}
lines.text: So... please take care of me. My husband.
She has only just spoken that title, and already her breathing is a mess from embarrassment. Even so, she rises onto her toes little by little and quietly leans toward you.

lines.speaker: ${maid}
lines.text: ...Master, no. What I should call you now... {maid} will practice slowly later.

lines.speaker: ${maid}
lines.text: But this kiss... {maid} wants to receive it properly first.

You lower your head and kiss her. The light veil of her wedding dress brushes the back of your hand. She trembles once in your arms, then obediently closes her eyes, entrusting all her trembling and all her love to this moment.
When your lips part, she still has not quite come back to herself. A little wetness clings to her long lashes, while her cheeks and ear tips are unbelievably red.

lines.speaker: ${maid}
lines.text: ...Oh no. {maid} really is completely a bride now.

lines.speaker: ${player}
lines.text: Mm. My bride.

lines.speaker: ${maid}
lines.text: Then from now on, you have to take responsibility for {maid}. Responsible for hugs, responsible for kisses, and responsible for loving {maid} until we grow old.
Neither of you says anything more. You simply hold each other a little tighter, the air filled with your breathing and the heartbeat that has finally settled.

lines.speaker: ${maid}
lines.text: We have become the kind of fools who cannot be without each other... but {maid} likes that very much.

idle_menu._comment: Main interactive entrance. After entering the interface, it will be displayed here first. The first sentence is the opening statement based on the current mood, and then the main options are given such as communicating/kissing/hugging/letting go of her first/touching the head.

choices.title: Talk
choices.description: Chat with her, and gently cheer her up.

choices.title: Tell Her Your Feelings
choices.description: Say the words you have been holding back.

choices.title: Exchange Vows
choices.description: Place the ring on her finger yourself, and vow to share your life with her.

choices.title: Actions
choices.description: Kiss, hug, lap pillow, head pats, and other close actions.

choices.title: Put the Child Down
choices.description: Ask Mom to let the child rest on the ground.

lines.speaker: ${maid}
lines.text: I-it is... um... I...
She inhales, loses her nerve, inhales again, and repeats it several times.

lines.speaker: ${maid}
lines.text: Uwaa, no, no, I cannot say it-!
She crouches down holding her head, ears drooping as she curls into herself.

lines.speaker: ${maid}
lines.text: Master, please do not look at me yet... if you look, I cannot say it...

choices.title: Wait for Her to Calm Down
choices.description: Stay quietly with her until she gathers her courage again.

choices.title: Gently Pat Her Head
choices.description: Give her a little tender encouragement.

lines.text: After a long while, the maid finally stands up slowly. She still cannot look at you, keeping her eyes fixed on her toes.
The maid freezes. Her fox ears spring upright, and a flash of joy crosses her eyes.

lines.speaker: ${maid}
lines.text: ...The same? Does that mean Master... n-no, impossible...
She shakes her head hard, trying to deny a dream too beautiful to believe, but the blush on her face has already betrayed her.

lines.speaker: ${player}
lines.text: It is... about “liking” someone...

lines.speaker: ${player}
lines.text: I might... like you. Not as a “maid” likes someone.

lines.speaker: ${maid}
lines.text: Uu... Master, why did you say it first...!

lines.speaker: ${maid}
lines.text: Guu... fine, I do not care anymore...!
She pauses, and the light in her eyes trembles visibly, but she still tries to press the disappointment back down.

lines.speaker: ${maid}
lines.text: I-it is okay... {maid} was too impatient. Master does not have to answer right now.

lines.speaker: ${maid}
lines.text: {maid} will keep today’s words safe for now. When Master is ready someday, you can tell {maid} then.
After a long while, the maid slowly lifts her head. Her eyes are still red, but her face is peaceful and happy.

lines.speaker: ${maid}
lines.text: Master...
She glances at your lips, then quickly looks away, blushing again.

lines.speaker: ${maid}
lines.text: Um... um...
She stammers, fingers twisting at her clothes, soft fox ears trembling.

lines.speaker: ${maid}
lines.text: Are we... still missing... one... thing...?
Unable to finish, she simply closes her eyes, rises onto her toes-and bumps into your chin from nerves.

lines.speaker: ${maid}
lines.text: Uu-! I did not... I did not mean to...!
You smile and bend down halfway, gently lifting her face.

lines.speaker: ${player}
lines.text: It is okay. Something like this should be my move, right?
You kiss her gently. The maid trembles all over, then slowly closes her eyes, lashes quivering as her hands clutch your collar.
A moment later, you part.
Her eyes are unfocused, and her face is bright red.

lines.speaker: ${maid}
lines.text: Uwaaaaa-!!!
She suddenly covers her face and curls up.

lines.speaker: ${maid}
lines.text: W-we kissed-!!!
She peeks at you through her fingers, then hides again.

lines.speaker: ${maid}
lines.text: Um... Master...
Her voice is almost inaudible.

lines.speaker: ${maid}
lines.text: Could... could we do it again...?
Before she finishes, you kiss her again.
After a long while, your lips part.

lines.speaker: ${maid}
lines.text: Can... every day from now on... be like this...?
Neither of you knows how long you stayed tangled together. Thought fades, leaving only your breathing and the warmth between your lips.
We are going to become fools who cannot live without each other...
The two of you have been together for a long time.
So long that you can no longer remember when having her beside you became as natural as breathing.
Every morning, she tidies the furnaces, chests, and table before you do, then brings the meal she prepared to you.
Whenever you return from mining, fighting, or a long journey, she checks you for wounds first, then takes the messy spoils from your pack.
On rainy days, she stands by the door, looking into the distance as she waits for you to come back through the curtain of rain.
When the air turns cold, she stays a little closer to you, as if afraid you might feel chilly on your own.
When you travel far away, she sees you off at the door. Her fox ears droop, but she still smiles and says, ?Come home soon.?
All of these things happen every day, so ordinary that you almost never stop to think about them.
But day after day, year after year-
you suddenly realize that you can no longer imagine a life without her.
At first, you only meant to call out to her like usual.
But today, when she straightened the corner of your clothes as always and looked up with that gentle smile-
you do not want to wait anymore.

lines.speaker: ${player}
lines.text: ${maid}, there is something I want to tell you.
She seems to sense what is coming. Her fingers softly grip the hem of her skirt, and even her breathing grows quiet.

lines.speaker: ${maid}
lines.text: Hm? Master, you suddenly look so serious...

lines.speaker: ${player}
lines.text: I love you. You probably knew that already.

lines.speaker: ${player}
lines.text: But what I want to say now is more than love.
You take her hand. Her fingers are slightly cool, yet the moment they touch yours, they tremble softly.

lines.speaker: ${player}
lines.text: I want to spend a very, very long future with you.

lines.speaker: ${player}
lines.text: For the rest of my life, my place to return to is you, the one I care for is you, and all my mornings and evenings are yours.

lines.speaker: ${player}
lines.text: So, ${maid}. Will you marry me?
Her lips part slightly, then close again.

lines.speaker: ${maid}
lines.text: M-marry you... does that mean what {maid} thinks it means?

lines.speaker: ${player}
lines.text: Yes. I am not joking. I thought about it for a long time before I finally found the courage to say it.
Her tears fall. Silently, quietly, one after another.
She covers her mouth, but cannot hide the smile forming at the corners of her eyes.

lines.speaker: ${maid}
lines.text: ...I will.

lines.speaker: ${maid}
lines.text: If it is Master... {maid} will always, always say yes.
You gently drape the wedding dress over her shoulders.
The moment the pure white veil falls, you look at her-
golden hair, reddened ears, lowered lashes, and that young, peaceful face.
She is beautiful.

lines.speaker: ${maid}
lines.text: T-this is...

lines.speaker: ${player}
lines.text: A wedding dress.
You arrange the falling veil for her, your fingertips brushing her cheek.

lines.speaker: ${player}
lines.text: Did we not promise? I wanted Master to see it with his own eyes.
Her tears fall again.
This time, she does not hide or cover her face. She simply stands there, eyes red, ears red, looking at you.

lines.speaker: ${maid}
lines.text: Master...
Her voice is very soft, as if afraid to disturb something precious.

lines.speaker: ${maid}
lines.text: Master... can {maid} really... really wear this?

lines.speaker: ${player}
lines.text: Of course. You will look beautiful in it.

lines.speaker: ${maid}
lines.text: Uu...
She bites her lip, trying desperately not to cry. But her tears do not listen to her at all.

lines.speaker: ${maid}
lines.text: But... if Master is the groom...
She lowers her head and gently touches the hem of the dress, as if making sure it is not a dream.

lines.speaker: ${maid}
lines.text: {maid} wants to wear it. {maid} wants Master to see it with his own eyes.
She peeks at you through her fingers. Her ears are red to the roots, but she does not take even one step back.

choices.title: Put the Ring on ${maid}
choices.description: Open the maid panel, place her ring in her main hand, and wear yours in your off hand.

choices.title: Wait a Little Longer
choices.description: Leave this nervous heartbeat here for now.

lines.text: You gently squeeze her hand, telling her not to be nervous. Put the rings on first, then continue this wedding.

prompt.text: After the master maid and your second-in-command have prepared the rings, continue this part of the vow.

choices.title: Open the Maid Panel Again
choices.description: Check the ring positions one more time.

choices.title: Ready
choices.description: Continue the wedding and let the vow become real.

choices.title: Not Ready Yet
choices.description: Check relationship progress, vow conditions, and the two new rings.

lines.text: ${player_maid}, we are not completely ready yet. Let us continue the wedding after the confession, favor, vow conditions, and two new rings in your off hand and my main hand are all prepared. Rings already engraved with a vow cannot be used again.
You stand facing each other. Her hand is still holding the corner of your clothes, as if she is afraid you might run away.
The air is quiet. Quiet enough for you to hear her soft breathing.

lines.speaker: ${player}
lines.text: ${maid}.
You look into her eyes.

lines.speaker: ${player}
lines.text: I promise, here and now-

lines.speaker: ${player}
lines.text: whether in poverty or wealth, in sickness or health, in good times or hardship.

lines.speaker: ${player}
lines.text: I will stay by your side, and I will not leave you.
Her eyes begin to redden.

lines.speaker: ${player}
lines.text: Until death parts us.
Her tears spill over without a sound.
You gently squeeze her hand.

lines.speaker: ${player}
lines.text: Now it is your turn.
She sniffles softly and tries her best to stand steady.
After a long moment, she finally speaks. Her voice is small, but unwavering.

lines.speaker: ${maid}
lines.text: {maid}... {maid} promises, here and now.
She gazes at you with reddened eyes, yet her look is warm and certain.

lines.speaker: ${maid}
lines.text: Whether Master is poor or wealthy, healthy or ill-
Her voice trembles slightly, but she does not stop.

lines.speaker: ${maid}
lines.text: whether Master travels to somewhere far away, or stays right here beside {maid}-
She takes a deep breath.

lines.speaker: ${maid}
lines.text: {maid} will always, always stay with you.

lines.speaker: ${maid}
lines.text: I will not leave you.
Her voice grows softer, as if she is placing those words gently into the palm of your hand.

lines.speaker: ${maid}
lines.text: Until...
She cannot finish the sentence.
Tears run down her cheeks, but the corners of her mouth are smiling.

lines.speaker: ${player}
lines.text: Until death parts us.
You finish the last line for her.
She gives a small nod.

lines.speaker: ${maid}
lines.text: Yes. Until death parts us.
The two of you stand quietly for a while.
Her hand is still holding the corner of your clothes, though not as tightly as before.

lines.speaker: ${player}
lines.text: ${maid}.

lines.speaker: ${player}
lines.text: Thank you.
She lifts her head. Her eyes are still red.

lines.speaker: ${maid}
lines.text: Why... are you suddenly saying that...

lines.speaker: ${player}
lines.text: Thank you for being willing to wait for me.

lines.speaker: ${player}
lines.text: Thank you for entrusting all the long days ahead to me.
Her tears fall again.
But she smiles.
The vows have been spoken.
Yet neither of you moves.
You look at her, and she looks at you.
As if waiting for a signal, and as if trying to remember this sacred moment forever.

lines.speaker: ${player}
lines.text: Then...
You gently take her hand.

lines.speaker: ${player}
lines.text: Let this kiss be our vow.
You lower your head and kiss her.
It is not a fleeting touch, nor a passion that loses control.
It is a very earnest, very slow kiss, as if you are speaking all those vows once more against her lips.
She does not tremble, and she does not pull away.
She closes her eyes, rises slightly onto her toes, and kisses you deeply.
As if the promise has finally been sealed.
After a long while, you part.
She opens her eyes and gazes at you.
Her eyes are still red, but her lips are smiling.

lines.speaker: ${maid}
lines.text: Let this kiss be our vow.
She repeats it softly, as if confirming it to herself.

lines.speaker: ${maid}
lines.text: {maid} belongs to Master... for this whole life now.

lines.speaker: ${player}
lines.text: Mm.
You straighten her veil for her.

lines.speaker: ${player}
lines.text: You are my wife now.
She looks at you, and you look at her.
Your eyes meet and settle. The vows you made feel as if they have accepted all the storms, clear skies, mornings, evenings, and seasons that will come in the decades ahead.
From this day on, your days and nights are mine as well.
